title: Investigation into MGM breach highlights how to assess risk, and need for timely assessment
summary: In February 2020, the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (the “ OPC ”) became aware of media reports regarding a large-scale data breach MGM suffered in 2019. Not having received a breach report on the matter, the OPC engaged with MGM to obtain additional information about the breach and the involvement of any personal informati...
